title: Field Memory — more field-logical memory from host DRAM and GPU VRAM
motto: Physical pool is real silicon; field_logical is MORE via sparse map + PAK
not: treating memory only as a disk image story
yes: Host DRAM → Field Memory plane (physical_pool + denser sparse address_space)
GPU DEVICE_LOCAL VRAM → Field Memory plane (same fabric)
map_divisor=8 on memory planes (denser than disk divisor=32)
KILROY kilroy-ensure brings both planes online

accounting.physical_pool: real host RAM or device-local VRAM reserved for the plane
accounting.guaranteed: worst-case usable if all frames high-H RAW
accounting.field_logical_address_space: sparse map — MORE addressable field memory than pool

defaults.host_pool: half of MemAvailable after 1 GiB headroom
defaults.gpu_pool: half of usable DEVICE_LOCAL budget, cap 8 GiB, leave display headroom
